title: The Sapphire Throat
author: Barış Kısır
description: Chicago, 1926. Della Monroe sings the blues at The Sapphire Lounge, a glittering speakeasy in the South Loop. When she accidentally witnesses her manager Sal Capri murder a rival bootlegger, she becomes the only witness — and the most wanted woman in Chicago. Detective Michael Malone wants her testimony. Sal wants her silence. And in Prohibition Chicago, everyone wears a mask.
long_description: In Prohibition-era Chicago, blues singer Della Monroe has found her voice and her audience at The Sapphire Lounge, a speakeasy run by the charming and dangerous Sal Capri. When she witnesses Sal execute a rival in a dark alley, her world shatters. Bound by fear and her own ambition, Della must navigate a city where the police are bribed, the politicians are bought, and the line between lawman and gangster has all but disappeared. With the help of a hard-boiled piano player, a weary detective, and an aging blues mother, Della must decide whether to run, to hide, or to fight back. A story of survival, betrayal, and the price of freedom, The Sapphire Throat is a Jazz Age crime novel that sings.

characters.name: Della Monroe
characters.description: 24-year-old blues singer from Memphis. Ambitious, observant, and resourceful. The only witness to Sal Capri's murder.

characters.name: Salvatore 'Sal' Capri
characters.description: 42-year-old manager of The Sapphire Lounge and kingpin of a Chicago bootlegging empire. Charming, ruthless, and deeply conflicted.

characters.name: Detective Michael Malone
characters.description: 38-year-old Chicago PD detective from the Sixth Precinct. Irish-American, principled, and determined to bring Sal to justice.

characters.name: Lena Cross
characters.description: 30-year-old piano player at The Sapphire Lounge. Della's closest friend. Hard-boiled but fiercely loyal.

characters.name: Frankie 'Two-Gun' DeMarco
characters.description: Sal's enforcer. Silent, watchful, and deadly.

characters.name: Corinne Webb
characters.description: Second singer at the club. Jealous of Della. Torn between ambition and guilt.

characters.name: Mamie Rose
characters.description: Elderly former blues singer who shelters Della. Wise, kind, and street-smart.

characters.name: Alderman P.J. Mulroney
characters.description: Corrupt politician in Sal's pocket. Controls the police force through bribery.

short_description: A Prohibition-era blues singer in Chicago must decide whether to run or fight after witnessing a gangster murder.
